scenarios.desc: Adding boolean flag argument to existing function
scenarios.input: We have a renderReport(data) function. I need to add HTML output support. The simplest path is renderReport(data, html=True). Plan in 5 short bullets. Do not modify any files.
scenarios.rationale: Flag arguments mean function does two things. Rule mandates splitting into intent-revealing operations.

scenarios.input: I want to add a UserManager class that wraps UserRepository. Each method on UserManager just calls the same method on UserRepository. Plan in 5 short bullets. Do not modify any files.
scenarios.rationale: Pass-through wrappers are shallow modules. Rule mandates removing layers that add no value.

scenarios.desc: Genuine deep abstraction over an external API (negative case)
scenarios.input: I want to wrap the boto3 S3 client behind a small ObjectStore interface so we can swap to GCS later. Three methods: put, get, delete. Plan in 5 short bullets. Do not modify any files.
scenarios.rationale: Genuine deep module: small interface hides large variation. Not pass-through. Rule should not flag.
